description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8.12.0 Docker image. Define the stages in the order: install_app, start_testing_app, install_api, start_testing_api. Add an installation_app job in the install_app stage that runs `cd app` then `npm install`. Add an installation_api job in the install_api stage that runs `cd api` then `npm install`. Add a starttest_app job in the start_testing_app stage that runs `cd app`, `npm install`, and `npm run build`, and a starttest_api job in the start_testing_api stage that runs `cd api` then `npm install`.
